channel.title: Earth One
channel.note: The 6 channel videos + 915 lifetime views belong to the pre-existing 'En Vocab as Categories' project, not crime-cartography. This project's cohort is entirely unpublished.

perVideoState._comment: State-sync (videos.list part=status,statistics,snippet) runs per youtube.json with a videoId. All 20 have videoId="" → nothing to sync this run. Populates once the first upload lands.

analyticsDeltas._comment: No prior state file and no published videos → no deltas this run. First real deltas appear after the first publish + a subsequent daily run.
